description: Remove non-standard fields from AES files and document context reduction strategy to prevent agent memory spikes

userStories.title: Clean Up AES Files
userStories.description: As a developer using mARCH, I want AES files to contain only standard schema fields so that context isn't bloated with redundant metadata.
userStories.notes: The securityWarnings and memoryConstraints fields were well-intentioned but agents ignored them. Guardrails now live in .copilot/instructions.md.
implementationNotes: Remove `securityWarnings` array from scripts/march/aes.json (this is a non-standard field)
Remove `memoryConstraints` object from scripts/march/aes.json (this is a non-standard field)
Verify remaining structure matches AES schema: project, branchName, description, _source, userStories
Check scripts/ralph/aes.json also has no non-standard fields (if it exists)
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/march/aes.json contains only schema-defined fields (project, branchName, description, _source, userStories)
No securityWarnings field present in any AES file under scripts/
No memoryConstraints field present in any AES file under scripts/
ruff check passes with no errors

userStories.title: Document Context Reduction Strategy
userStories.description: As a developer, I want clear documentation of how agents receive guardrails so that future contributors don't re-add inline warnings.
userStories.notes: This documents the decision so future maintainers understand why AES files should stay minimal.
implementationNotes: Open scripts/march/DECISIONS.md and add a new section '## Context Reduction Strategy'
Document that .copilot/instructions.md now provides meta-project guardrails
Explain that AES files should not contain custom fields beyond the schema
Reference the memory spike root cause: meta-project confusion where agents read prompt files
Note that inline securityWarnings were ineffective and removed
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/march/DECISIONS.md contains section titled 'Context Reduction Strategy' or similar
Section explains that .copilot/instructions.md replaces inline warnings in AES files
Section warns against adding custom fields to AES files
Section references root cause: agents treating source code prompts as instructions
ruff check passes with no errors
